subject: Priority Shift to Tool Execution (The Hands)
context: The Jordan AI Router is stabilized. The Mind and Body are synchronized. We are now moving to activate the Hands. Step 1 (Wire Real Tool Execution) is the primary priority.

priorities.requirement: Integrate Gmail API, Google Drive, Web Search.
Approved intents must trigger real-world API calls.
Post-execution SHA-256 hash must be recorded.

engineering_constraint: Maintain the deterministic plane. Do not allow Thinking Mode to bypass the RIO Governance Kernel. Every tool call must be an extracted intent that awaits the human cryptographic Yes.
